--- grant_usage_on_schema_named.sql
GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA db.sch1, sch2 TO ROLE r1, r2

--- AST
&ast.Grant{
  Privilege: &ast.UsagePrivilegeOnSchema{
    Usage:   6,
    Default: -1,
    Schemas: []*ast.Path{
      &ast.Path{
        Idents: []*ast.Ident{
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 22,
            NameEnd: 24,
            Name:    "db",
          },
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 25,
            NameEnd: 29,
            Name:    "sch1",
          },
        },
      },
      &ast.Path{
        Idents: []*ast.Ident{
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 31,
            NameEnd: 35,
            Name:    "sch2",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Roles: []*ast.Ident{
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 44,
      NameEnd: 46,
      Name:    "r1",
    },
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 48,
      NameEnd: 50,
      Name:    "r2",
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA db.sch1, sch2 TO ROLE r1, r2
